description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa featuring a sturdy wooden frame with a warm brown finish and clean, angular lines. The seat and backrest are each divided into two large, rectangular cushions upholstered in a light gray fabric, providing a uniform and minimalist appearance. The cushions appear to be thick and plush, offering comfort while maintaining a structured look. The armrests are made of exposed wood, matching the frame, and are set at a comfortable height relative to the seat. The legs are integrated into the frame, straight and positioned at the corners, giving the sofa a stable and balanced stance. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban environments such as parks, public plazas, or modern waiting areas.
description: A modern two-seater sofa with a wooden frame, straight armrests, and thick, light gray cushions. The design is minimalist and structured, with exposed wood and uniform upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and two back cushions, straight wooden armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the cushions, the angular wooden armrest, and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest cushions and the wooden frame structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and cushion profile from the other side.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Four large, rectangular cushions: two for the seat and two for the backrest, all uniform in size and likely loose but fitted closely together.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, exposed wooden armrests at seat height, angular profile with no padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four straight, exposed wooden legs integrated into the frame at each corner, rectangular in cross-section, matching the armrest and frame material.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-high, straight backrest with two large, uniform cushions, continuous across the width, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern or decorative stitching.
